title: 4 Pcs Silicone Spatula Set Mini Jar Scraper Small Silicone Spatula Makeup Spatula Mini Spatula Lotion Stirrer Get from Food Bottles Beauty Products (Grace Colors)
description:
About this item
Safe Materia -- Mini jar scraper are made of quality silicone material,can be reused and has good toughness,safe and non-toxic,easily bypass the corners of the container,very convenient.
No Waste of Any Little -- The makeup silicone spatula has a long enough body and narrow head for reaching food in jars and other tnarrow spaces,even for bottle with slight opening,you will not waste.
Easy to clean -- Silicone spatula for makeup adopts one-piece molding design,no crevices and easy to clean, save your time,you can carry them for travel,home use,bring convenience to your life.
Wide Application -- Our small silicone spatulas can also be applied for cosmetics, hand body lotion,facial mask,lip gloss,mud mask,peanut butter, ketchup and other every day items.
What you will get -- 4 pcs red /multicolor/black/purple/green jar scraper set,1 large spatula is 30.5 x 1.6 cm/ 12 x 0.6 inch,1 medium spatula is 22.9 x 1 cm/ 9 x 0.39 inch,2 mini spatula is 15.2 x 0.8 cm/ 5.98 x 0.3 inch, different sizes to meet your various needs.
reviews_5s:
These small spoons and scrapers are perfect to get the last of your product out of the bottle/jar!!! There are 4 sizes so you should be able to find a size that fits any opening!! I used the spoon side to scoop out some of my face lotion and put it in a silicone travel container. Then when I got back home, I scooped it out of the travel container back into the original container. Didn’t waste a drop!! I’m so happy I bought these!! I’ll probably use that largest one in the kitchen to scrape out the remaining condiments! I wish I’d bought these sooner!!These worked perfectly for getting out the last bit of product at the bottom of the jar/bottles. Beauty products aren't cheap and I was amazed how much I was able to scrape out of the container. Easy to clean and kinda sturdy. They aren't like spatula sturdy, but a little less. I've used them lotions, hair products, and face creams.I bought them for my mom and she loves them. They are perfect to get the last drop of her skin care and makeupThese are really well made spatula/spoons with sturdy handles that fit inside any small bottles. Highly recommend.I love that someone came up with this idea. I always try to use a product to the very last drop and now I easily can.Some of the more oil-based spices get a bit stuck in the bottom & these are just the thing to get it out. If it's between getting the last out or running to the store mid-recipe, I'd rather have these on hand. The 3 shorter ones stay in the kitchen, but the longer one is in the bathroom waiting for the next time I can't get the last out of a pricey bottle of lotion.Variety pack is the perfect choice. I have a use for each of the sizes. I needed a long one to reach the bottom of the lotion bottle. I needed the thinner short one to reach into the sunscreen bottle.Finally a product that helps scoop out sunscreens and cosmetic lotions from sides and bottom of bottles! It creates less waste and makes recycling easier.Play Video
Absolutely essential to anyone who still has makeup /skin care at the bottom or the jar or bottle and thinks they are wasting it. I have some serums that still have plenty left after the pump stops pumping and that's when these spatulas come in. They are perfect for scraping the last little bits out. Another plus - I wear acrylic nails, therefore don't have a ball of the finger to swipe around jars, I have to use my nail. No more! The smallest one is perfect for getting that last bit of lip balm. The purple one is very long and was used on a huge cocoa butter bottle and stood up perfectly. Highly recommend. They pay for themselves in extra product.The only spatulas thin and versatile enough to get into bottles so that we can use all of the various products such as lotions and condiments that can't otherwise empty thoroughly. In some cases, I had over a week's portions of hand lotion still in the bottle of a tall bottle. Cutting through these bottles would be too messy, so this is the best solution I know to do the job and save money! Great item, and great gift idea for friends and family!
reviews_1s:
It’s great until you realize the firm material in the handle barely extends into the spoon or spatula. It’s so flexible it’s incapable of scraping a jar. It’s like cutting a sandwich with a jump rope.These suck. The silicone is ripping because the metal inside only goes half way to the tip. Can’t scrape anything out of jars. What a waste of time and moneyThe spoon part is too bendable to pick up product. Not worth it.The spoon is too soft.was so excited to receive these thinking of all the helpful uses i planned to put them to, but they arent stiff at all. the heads are floppy and cant support any useful pressure for use when applied, and end up cracking off. super disappointed in the productthe spatula and spoon ends are so flimsy they bend and do not serve the purpose as intended- folding with any amount of pressure, and therefore do not scrape productPlay Video
The spoon tip is so floppy it can't scoop anything. It has no reinforcement inside. The spatula end is somewhat better, but still too weak to scrap out the contents of a jar we'll.I used these for my foundation and I could not wash my makeup off them. I tried washing by hand and in the dishwasher and they would not come clean. I mean I'm sure they were clean but they did not look clean. Ended up returning them.These are not the best for makeup. I've used one, So I will not try to return. The makeup is really hard to remove from the spatula. I even tried makeup remover and not all came off. The spoon and spatula are not attached inside to the handle in middle.I thought these were much smaller from the picture.

I was hoping to use it to get extra foundation from my makeup bottle but too big to fit in the hole.
